name: Veal Pot Roast
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons Bacon fat or salad oil
1 Veal - 1/2 leg (or 3-4 pounds rolled shoulder of veal)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt or heat the bacon fat or oil in a cast iron saucepan.
2. Stuff the 2 garlic cloves, cut into halves, into incisions made in the veal.
3. Place the meat in the hot fat and brown well on all sides. Do not rush this step, as the color and flavor of the finished gravy will depend on how well the meat has been browned.
4. Add thyme or savory and the bay leaf to the pan with the meat.
5. Arrange the potatoes and onions around the meat without adding any liquid.
6. Cover tightly and cook over medium heat until the meat is tender, about 2 hours. The vegetables will not break as there is no liquid added; they will simply absorb the flavors of the gravy.
7. Once cooked, remove the meat to a heated platter.
8. Place the pan back on high heat and gently stir the vegetables so that they are well coated with gravy. Cook for a few more minutes until the gravy has reached the desired consistency.
9. Serve as a complete meal.
